violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by a trash can. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. New Violation. Correct By: 01/09/2024

The door to the outside, located in the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2024

The presence of flies is not controlled as evidenced by live activity in the front and back prep areas. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Per PIC, pest control has been contacted and establishment will receive weekly pest control services until activity is resolved. PIC to send pest control reports to inspector after each service. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2024
Water was observed pooling under the 3-bay sink and in the front prep/cashier area. Facilities must be kept cleaned and free of pooling/standing water. New Violation. Correct By: 01/09/2024
